phrases.english: Feel your feet, on the ground.
Notice your thoughts, let them go.
This moment, is all you have.
phrases.bosnian: Ovaj trenutak, je sve što imaš.
phrases.transliteration: Ovaj trenutak, je sve što imaš.

phrases.english: My heart is full, you know?
Imagine the impossible, then build it.
Believe in yourself, then you can.
Learn a word, open a door.
I am lost, can you help?
phrases.bosnian: Izgubio/la sam se, možete li pomoći?
phrases.transliteration: Izgubio/la sam se, mozhete li pomochi?

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you think.
My dear mother, I love you.

phrases.bosnian: Smiješi se često, smej se glasno.
phrases.transliteration: Smiyeshi se chesto, smey se glasno.

phrases.english: Keep going, you can do it.
Slow and steady, wins the race.
Good things, take time to grow.
phrases.bosnian: Dobre stvari, trebaju vremena da rastu.
phrases.transliteration: Dob-reh star-ee, tre-ba-yoo vre-me-na da ras-too.

phrases.bosnian: Razumij se kulturu, poveži se duboko.
phrases.transliteration: Razumiy se kulturu, povezhi se duboko.

phrases.english: Listen more, speak less, learn much.
phrases.bosnian: Slušaj više, govori manje, uči mnogo.
phrases.transliteration: Slu-shai vee-sheh, go-vo-ree man-yeh, oo-chee mno-go.

phrases.english: Patience, my friend, is a virtue.

phrases.bosnian: Greške se dese, uči iz njih.
phrases.transliteration: Greh-shkeh seh deh-seh, oo-chee eez n'yeeh.

phrases.english: Try again, you can do it.
Do you have, this in blue?
Can I try this on, please?
You can do this, I believe in you.

phrases.bosnian: Svaka riječ je bitna, udahni duboko.
phrases.transliteration: Svah-kah ree-yetch yeh beet-nah, oo-dah-nee doo-boh-koh.

phrases.bosnian: Svaka riječ je važna, uči ih.
phrases.transliteration: Svaka rijec' je vazhna, uchi ih.

phrases.bosnian: Poveži se s drugima, govori bosanski.
phrases.transliteration: Poveži se s drugima, govori bosanski.

phrases.english: A moment's peace, a lifetime's reward.
Offer support, with an open heart.

phrases.bosnian: Tako sam zahvalan, za tvoju pomoć.
phrases.transliteration: Ta-ko sam zah-vah-lan, za tvoh-yoo poh-moch.

phrases.english: My heart is full, of thanks.
We share everything, you and I.
A true partner, by my side.

phrases.bosnian: Pleši kao da niko ne gleda.
phrases.transliteration: Plesh'i kao da niko ne gleda.

phrases.english: Where can I find, local crafts?
Open a book, open your mind.
A dog barks, loud and clear.
Fish swim, in the deep blue.
A bee buzzes, near the flowers.

phrases.bosnian: Uči svaki dan, rasti svaki dan.
phrases.transliteration: Uči svaki dan, rasti svaki dan.

phrases.english: This task is challenging, but doable.
phrases.bosnian: Ovaj zadatak je težak, ali izvodljiv.
phrases.transliteration: Ovaj zadatak je težak, ali izvodljiv.

phrases.english: The deadline is approaching, so hurry.
Guest is like God, always welcome.
phrases.bosnian: Gost je kao Bog, uvijek dobrodošao.
phrases.transliteration: Gohst yeh kah-oh Bohg, ooh-vyek doh-broh-doh-shao.

phrases.english: Share a story, build a bridge.
Music fills the soul, with joy.
Taste the tradition, with every bite.
Embrace the struggle, learn from it.
My heart, is full of joy.
A wave of calm, washed over me.

phrases.bosnian: Malo sam tužna, ali i vedra.
phrases.transliteration: Malo sam tuzna, ali i vedra.

phrases.english: You're my sunshine, on cloudy days.
phrases.bosnian: Ti si moje sunce, u tmurnim danima.
phrases.transliteration: Ti si moje sunce, u tmurnim danima.

phrases.english: We laugh, we cry, we're family.
Always there, for me, you are.
phrases.bosnian: Uvijek tu, za mene, ti si.
phrases.transliteration: Uvijek tu, za mene, ti si.

phrases.english: Through thick, and thin, we go.
phrases.bosnian: Kroz dobro, i zlo, idemo zajedno.
phrases.transliteration: Kroz dobro, i zlo, idemo zajedno.

phrases.english: Open your mind, new ideas will bloom.
phrases.bosnian: Otvori um, nove ideje će procvjetati.
phrases.transliteration: Otvori um, nove ideje ce procvjetati.

phrases.english: Try new things, discover your talents.
phrases.bosnian: Probaj nove stvari, otkrij svoje talente.
phrases.transliteration: Probaj nove stvari, otkrij svoje talente.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, with every word.
phrases.bosnian: Otključaj nove svjetove, sa svakom riječi.
phrases.transliteration: Otkljuchay nove svetove, sa svakom rechi.

phrases.english: Taste the flavour, of this language.

phrases.bosnian: Vanjska je hladnoća, obući se toplo.
phrases.transliteration: Vansjska ye hladnoca, obuchi se toplo.

phrases.english: Dare to try, you might surprise yourself.
phrases.bosnian: Usudi se probati, možda se iznenadiš.
phrases.transliteration: Usudi se probati, mozda se iznenadis.

phrases.english: Push through the doubt, find clarity.
Taste the flavor, learn the words.
Listen to the heart, speak the truth.
Open your mind, to Bosnian sounds.
Budget your money, control your life.
Think long term, secure your future.
Little by little, we get there.

phrases.bosnian: Svaki korak je bitan, diši mirno.
phrases.transliteration: Svaki korak je bitan, dishi mirno.

phrases.english: Wait for the right moment, then act.
The seeds will sprout, with care.
My favorite sweater, is so cozy.
phrases.bosnian: Moj omiljeni džemper, je tako udoban.
phrases.transliteration: Moy omiljeni dzemper, ye tako udoban.

phrases.english: Where did you buy, that stylish jacket?
phrases.bosnian: Gdje si kupila, tu modernu jaknu?
phrases.transliteration: Gde si kupila, tu modernu jaknu?

phrases.english: I need a new pair, of jeans.
This dress, is perfect for the party.
phrases.bosnian: Ova haljina, je idealna za zabavu.
phrases.transliteration: Ova haljina, ye idealna za zabavu.

phrases.english: Open your mind, find new paths.
A kind word, a warm embrace.
Share a smile, brighten their day.
Explore Bosnia, one phrase at a time.
Plant a word, watch understanding grow.
phrases.bosnian: Posadi riječ, gledaj kako raste razumijevanje.
phrases.transliteration: Posadi riječ, gledaj kako raste razumijevanje.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, one phrase at a time.
A new language, a new you.

phrases.bosnian: Hajdemo se pozabaviti ovim, zar ne?
phrases.transliteration: Hajdemo se pozabaviti ovim, zar ne?

phrases.bosnian: Nešto nije u redu, čujete li me?
phrases.transliteration: Neshto nije u redu, chu-yeh-teh li meh?

phrases.english: I feel dizzy, need to sit.
My leg is hurt, can you assist?
phrases.bosnian: Noga me boli, možete li pomoći?
phrases.transliteration: Noga meh boli, mozhe-teh li pomochi?

phrases.english: There's a gas leak, smell it?

phrases.bosnian: Treba mi vode, baš sam žedan.
phrases.transliteration: Tre-bah mi vo-deh, bash sam zheh-dahn.

phrases.bosnian: Kafa se kuha, um se budi.
phrases.transliteration: Kafa se kuha, um se budi.

phrases.english: Keys in hand, out the door.
Settle into stillness, feel the quiet.
phrases.bosnian: Smiri se u tišini, osjeti mir.
phrases.transliteration: Smiri se u tišini, osjeti mir.

phrases.english: Open your senses, to the world around.
Let go, of what no longer serves.
phrases.bosnian: Pusti, ono što više ne služi.
phrases.transliteration: Pusti, ono što više ne služi.

phrases.english: Peace on earth, goodwill to all.
phrases.bosnian: Mir na zemlji, dobra volja svima.
phrases.transliteration: Mir na zem-li, dobra vol-ya zvi-ma.

phrases.bosnian: Mislim na vas, u ovo doba.
phrases.transliteration: Mis-lim na vas, u o-vo do-ba.

phrases.english: Plant a curious seed, watch it grow.
phrases.bosnian: Posadi radoznalo sjeme, gledaj ga kako raste.
phrases.transliteration: Posadi radoznalo sjeme, gledaj ga kako raste.

phrases.english: A spark of curiosity, ignites within.
phrases.bosnian: Iskra znatiželje, budi se u meni.
phrases.transliteration: Iskra znatiželje, budi se u meni.

phrases.english: A gentle warmth, spreads through me.
phrases.bosnian: Blaga toplina, širi se kroz mene.
phrases.transliteration: Blaga toplina, širi se kroz mene.

phrases.english: A sense of wonder, takes hold.
This tune is lovely, isn't it?
phrases.bosnian: Ova melodija je divna, zar ne?
phrases.transliteration: Ova melodiya yè divna, zar nè?

phrases.bosnian: Mir, neka je s tobom, sada.
phrases.transliteration: Mir, neka je s tobom, sada.

phrases.english: The path may twist, but you'll arrive.
phrases.bosnian: Putanja može vijugati, ali stići ćeš.
phrases.transliteration: Putanja mozhe vijugati, ali stici' chesh.

phrases.bosnian: Generacije se povezuju, kroz zajednički smijeh.
phrases.transliteration: Generacije se povezuju, kroz zajednički smijeh.

phrases.english: Think for a moment, then answer.
Imagine this scene, what do you see?
Describe the picture, use your own words.
Follow the instructions, step by step.
Guess the meaning, what does it suggest?
In due time, all will be clear.
phrases.bosnian: Svojim vremenom, sve će biti jasno.
phrases.transliteration: Svojim vremenom, sve će biti jasno.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, word by word.
phrases.bosnian: Otključaj nove svjetove, riječ po riječ.
phrases.transliteration: Otkljuchaj nove svjetove, r'yeech po r'yeech.

phrases.english: My dear guest, glad you're here.
I like your hat, very much.
phrases.bosnian: Tvoja kapa, mi se mnogo sviđa.
phrases.transliteration: Tvoja kapa, mi se mnogo svidja.

phrases.english: These socks, keep my feet warm.
I'm looking for gloves, for winter.
